info.name: Purple Dragon Squire
info.description: The Purple Dragon Squire background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Skill Proficiencies: Animal Handling and Insight
Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Spear, Navigator’s Tools, Fine Clothes, 9 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You’ve pledged your life to the safety of Cormyr and sought admission to that realm’s order of elite warriors: the Purple Dragon Knights. But before you have the chance to join the ranks officially, you must first serve as a knight’s squire. You’ve found a liege willing to take you on and teach you the order’s ways. Will you uphold the Purple Dragon Knights’ ideals of glory, honor, and strength and prove yourself worthy of knighthood?
Trinket. Roll on the Purple Dragon Knight Trinkets table to determine what trinket you have from your time with the Purple Dragon Knights.

tr.td: A common purple quartz cut to resemble a dragon’s eye
A signal whistle audible only to amethyst dragons
A robin’s egg encased in amber
A whetstone that leaves any blade it hones faintly glittery
A vamplate taken from a slain rival jouster

setters.set: Strength, Wisdom, Charisma, Purple Dragon Rook Feat, Animal Handling and Insight Skills, and Navigator’s Tools

select.name: Purple Dragon Knight Trinkets
select.item: A common purple quartz cut to resemble a dragon’s eye
A signal whistle audible only to amethyst dragons
A robin’s egg encased in amber
A whetstone that leaves any blade it hones faintly glittery
A vamplate taken from a slain rival jouster
